name: Anar-Reedwhisper
personality: This luminous × cancel-eyed duck wears a halo that glows just a bit brighter when a flaky test finally succumbs to its systematic assault. Do not ask it for a witty postmortem — it is writing the regression test and the wit budget was never allocated.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
